name: Garoon
description: Cybozus enterprise groupware — schedule, workflow, portal for 6500+ JP enterprises with REST and SOAP APIs.

seo.title: Garoon — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Garoon: Cybozus enterprise groupware — schedule, workflow, portal for 6500+ JP enterprises with REST and SOAP APIs.

when_to_use: Enterprise groupware calendar sync with REST API integration
Workflow portal for Japanese enterprise approval processes
Scheduling and meeting management for 6500+ JP companies
Portal customization for internal announcements via API
SOAP/REST integration linking Garoon to HR and ERP systems

pros: REST and SOAP APIs for integration
Schedule, workflow, portal in one suite
cons: UI dated vs modern collaboration tools
review.verdict: Default enterprise groupware in Japan, largely unknown elsewhere — dated but deeply embedded.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises needing battle-tested groupware with API integrations
review.not_for: Global teams or anyone starting fresh on modern collaboration stacks

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Per-seat plan; no explicit annual non-reducible commit evidence.
